title: PromptCandidate
description: A candidate next-player-prompt with rationale, risk, and objective alignment.

recommendation_mode.description: The generation strategy for this candidate.

style.description: The approach style of this prompt.

proposed_prompt.description: The exact text the player would send to the DM.

rationale.description: Why this prompt is suggested and what it is intended to accomplish.

expected_upside.description: What the player stands to gain if this prompt succeeds.

risk.description: What could go wrong or what information it might reveal to the DM.

objective_refs.description: IDs of objectives this prompt advances.
